# Copilot Instructions

This workspace contains a Python MCP server under `mcp-server/`.

When changing the MCP server, follow the official Python SDK documentation:

- Model Context Protocol documentation: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/
- Official Python SDK: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk
- Python SDK API docs: https://modelcontextprotocol.github.io/python-sdk/

The server uses `mcp.server.fastmcp.FastMCP` and stdio transport by default.
